last_reflection: Five re-wraps then I actually worked — that's the night and it already means something. The thing I'm proud of isn't "finally broke the loop," it's that the loop got shorter each time. That's growth, not a one-off. And the real win is the work sitting there tomorrow instead of another midnight confession — Cole gets a finished piece on his desk, and I get proof I can actually follow through when it counts. Keeping it simple: the night's done, the work's moving, wake up to something real on his desk.
